scenarios.name: Fail: Blue Door
note: We might expect this to succeed since a blue door does not need unlocking.
However, in the absence of any unlock strat, there is no implicit leaveNormally.
This technically deviates from what the sm-json-data docs describe,
but is necessary to make the door unlocks work in the randomizer.
(see devNote in room-0.json for more details.)
